api: Klaus (Zendesk QA) public REST API v2 (https://kibbles.klausapp.com/api/v2)
scope: wave2 fan-out migration: 2 of 3 legacy-parity read streams (users, categories); the reviews stream is blocked (ENGINE_GAP, see docs.md) and every other Klaus resource (scorecards, root causes, comments/disputes management, and all write/mutation endpoints) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: legacy's reviews stream walks forward through fromDate/toDate weekly date windows (harvestWindowed), issuing one request per window until the configured/derived end is reached -- there is no PaginationSpec type or incremental-block shape that expresses a fixed-step sliding date-window request loop (the 6 declarative pagination types are all page/cursor/offset/link-based, single-request-per-page; incremental.request_param sends exactly one lower-bound param, never a paired fromDate+toDate window that re-issues sequential requests across a sync). This is a StreamHook-shaped whole-stream read override, forbidden under this wave's JSON+docs.md-only hard rule. See docs.md's Known limits.

endpoints.path: scorecards, root causes, comment/dispute management endpoints

excluded.reason: Pass B capability expansion; legacy itself is read-only (capabilities.write: false)
